name: CLARKE
description: Cognitive Learning Augmentation Retrieval Knowledge Engine — brokered memory and context management for OpenClaw agents.

endpoint.label: CLARKE API Endpoint
endpoint.help: URL of the CLARKE API server (fallback: CLARKE_API_URL env var).

tenant_id.label: Tenant ID
tenant_id.help: CLARKE tenant ID. Auto-registered from workspace if not set.

project_id.label: Project ID
project_id.help: CLARKE project ID. Auto-registered from workspace if not set.
